  "findings": [
    "Exit sign internal battery failed to illuminate the sign during manual test-button simulation of power loss."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace the failed backup battery pack inside the exit sign unit.",
    "Retest the unit using the manual test button to verify proper emergency illumination.",
    "Log the test results and maintenance action in the facility's emergency lighting logbook."
  ],
  "rationale": "An exit sign with a dead battery fails to meet the emergency illumination requirements of NFPA 101 and NEC 700, which mandate a reliable secondary power source capable of providing at least 90 minutes of emergency light during a utility power outage.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 700.12",
    "NFPA 101 Section 7.9.2"
  ]
}
